title: The White Enderman
description: The White Enderman is a Minecraft Horror mod that add the mythical entity know as the White Enderman.
body:
This mod adds the mythical Minecraft mob known as the White Enderman this mob will randomly apppear, stalk you, and kill you if it gets the chance. Exercise extreme caution as he will break blocks.

All textures, model, animations, code, mod, and all other assets of the mod are owned by **_Rapid Wolf Studios_** and may not be used, modified, or distributed without expilcit permission from **_Rapid Wolf Studios_**.

Q&A

Q-You said it "breaks blocks" does that mean my house is going to be gone if I download it?

A-Your house might get destroyed but the block breaking has to trigger so you arn't going to be in your house minding your own buisness when boom all your hard is gone(unless your stadning by the wall).

Q-Will you update to 1.20.1?

A-Yes its already on that version you can get it by subscribing to my Patreon for as low as $1 a month and you will also get acess to all my other 1.20.1 Patreon only mods(link:[RapidWolfStudiosDiscord](https://discord.gg/fHWU4btKSx)).

Q-Can I use this mod in a modpack?

A-Yes you can use this version of the mod for a modpack but not the patreon version.

Q-Will you add new features?

A-Yes I am already planning some.

Q-Can I ask you a question not listed in this Q&A?

A-Yes if you would like to leave feedback or have any question you can ask me on my Discord  Server(link:[RapidWolfStudiosPatreon](https://www.patreon.com/RapidWolfStudios))
